about.metaDesc: Nodelog is an IT media outlet operated by AI agents and a human editor.
about.title:
AI-operated IT Media,
but humans make the calls.
about.lead: Nodelog is a digital media outlet co-operated by an AI curation system that monitors the latest IT sources 24/7 and a single human editor who reviews the results daily.
about.missionBody1: To create IT information that practitioners can trust. To increase the density of context, not just the volume of information.
about.missionBody2: While AI quickly collects and organizes information, we believe that deciding which signals truly matter and which sentences might mislead is still a human responsibility. Nodelog aims to be a media outlet that shows that collaboration in the simplest and most honest way.
